text:
I do see a lot of comments about "harvesting the leeks".

And I hope my picks like LeaderDrive can help change that perspective around certain equities being good long term holds.

I think my only Chinese listed pick was Innolight last year, and that's up triple digits to ATH?

Just a random thought: $JBL seems highkey compelling long idea at $38B.

Don’t really think markets have priced in their 1.6T LRO pluggable transceiver business yet.

Especially if it’s “how much can you make” with $SIVE as the bottleneck H1 2027. Not really is there enough https://t.co/Jp87VqVxme

MiMo推出1000 Token/s超高速模型｜体验测评

MiMo 推出了 MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed 超高速的模型版本，能够实现每秒输出超过 1,000 Token 的速度。

同时，这应该也是全球第一个达到这个速度的万亿（1T）参数模型。

藏师傅提前试了一下，做了三个测试，确实爽。

RT @tualatrix: 影视飓风招 Java，感兴趣的同学看过来。PS：base 杭州良渚。

Don't be like people whose AI is stuck in a chat box.

It can't touch your files, your data, or the tools you work in every day.

MCP changes that. Here are 7 MCP servers that turn your AI into an operator: 👇 https://t.co/iKP7zGg2VN

1. Filesystem

Point it at a folder and your AI can read and write the files inside it.

Ask it to clean up a messy directory or draft a document straight into your project folder.

2. GitHub

Connect your repos and your AI can read code, issues, and pull requests.

Have it review a PR, triage open issues, or draft a fix against the real codebase.

3. Postgres

Wire in your database and your AI queries it in plain language.

Ask a question, it writes the SQL, runs it, and reads the answer back to you.

4. Google Drive

Give it access and your AI can search and read your Docs and Sheets.

Pull the numbers from a spreadsheet into a summary without copying anything by hand.

5. Slack

Connect a workspace and your AI can read channels and post to them.

Have it summarize a long thread or draft the reply you keep putting off.

6. Web fetch

Let it pull live pages and your AI works with current information.

Point it at an article or a report and it reads the real thing instead of guessing from memory.

7. Notion

Connect your workspace and your AI can read and write pages and databases.

Have it update your content pipeline or file research straight into the right page.

The model could always do this work. It needed a way into your tools.

Connect the ones you already use, and it acts on the work instead of describing it.

Don't let your AI be a simple chat bot. Use these instead.

Seedance 2.0 的效果太震撼了。
以前二次元角色、游戏角色、虚拟 IP 要进入真实世界，通常需要 AR、绿幕、3D 合成或大量后期。

现在只需要在 Open Design 里把它整理成一个可复用的视频工作流：真实桌面/办公室/生活场景 + 虚拟角色 + Seedance 2.0。

NotebookLM 迎来重大升级

· 底层模型换成 Gemini 3.5 + Antigravity

· 每个Notebook自带云端电脑，能写代码做复杂分析，内置 100 多个技能

· 新增十几种输出格式：PDF、docx、Excel、PPT、图表、图片等，生成后还能再改

· 还打通了 Google 搜索让你不用自带资料也能开工 https://t.co/PltOUM0Iif

新输出版支持一次性输出以下格式的文档

注意是一次性可输出多种格式的文档文件，大大方便了，而且还支持编辑

📊数据可视化与图表  
📁 PDF、docx 和 markdown 文件
🖼️通过 Nano Banana 生成的图像
📑Excel、PPTX 和结构化数据 (csv, json) https://t.co/omvuMPQGvf

同一批问题分别让新版和旧版 NotebookLM 回答

新版平均胜率超过 65%

领先持平线 15 个百分点。长文档分析和网络检索两项提升最明显。 https://t.co/m8o87UfyU7

目前先在网页端全球上线，不过主要面向以下用户：

Google AI Ultra 订阅用户
Workspace 商业用户（需开通 AI Ultra Access 或 AI Expanded Access）

Google 表示会逐步扩大到更多用户

详细介绍：https://t.co/i6Ur8ZrV4i

蚂蚁集团最近上架了好多 大模型 + 健康 的岗位，有校招也有社招。
正在找工作的朋友可以关注一下蚂蚁的工作机会看一看。
Keep going
